data.title: Obsidian Energy Sets May 7, 2026 Shareholder Meeting to Vote on Governance and Equity Plans
data.description:

Obsidian Energy ( (TSE:OBE) ) has provided an announcement.

Obsidian Energy has called its 2026 annual and special meeting of shareholders for May 7, 2026, in Calgary, issuing a management information circular and proxy materials dated March 15, 2026. Shareholders will vote on routine annual matters, including receiving 2025 financial statements, appointing auditors and electing directors, as well as several compensation and equity-related items.

The agenda includes an advisory vote on the company’s executive pay practices, amendments to its stock option plan, and approval of all unallocated options and share unit awards under its equity incentive plans. The meeting will help shape Obsidian’s governance and compensation framework for the coming year, with both registered and beneficial shareholders instructed to submit proxies or voting instructions ahead of the May 5, 2026 deadline.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:OBE) stock is a Hold with a C$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Obsidian Energy stock, see the TSE:OBE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OBE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OBE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance—improving profitability and conservative leverage, but sharp revenue decline and two years of negative free cash flow. Technicals add support with an uptrend across key moving averages and positive momentum. Valuation is a headwind due to a negative P/E and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on OBE stock, click here.

More about Obsidian Energy

Obsidian Energy Ltd. is a Calgary-based oil and gas producer operating in the Canadian energy sector. The company focuses on the exploration and development of crude oil and natural gas assets, primarily serving institutional and retail investors in North American capital markets through its Toronto and New York listings.

data.title: Taoping Files Form 6-K Detailing Skyladder Acquisition and Pro Forma Financials
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Taoping ( (TAOP) ).

On April 7, 2026, Taoping filed a Form 6-K detailing its November 26, 2025 acquisition of Skyladder Group Limited, a Hong Kong holding company, and the resulting structure of downstream subsidiaries in Shenzhen and Tianjin. The filing clarifies that several Skyladder entities, including Shenzhen Smart Skyladder IoT and Tianjin Weida Elevator, were only combined under Skyladder Group after June 30, 2025 due to the later incorporation of intermediate holding company Skyladder Tianjin.

To support investors’ understanding of this reorganization, Taoping furnished audited and unaudited historical financial statements for Shenzhen Smart Skyladder and Tianjin Weida for 2023–2024 and the six months ended June 30, 2025, along with unaudited pro forma combined financials reflecting ownership of Skyladder Group and its subsidiaries. The pro forma data, presented for informational purposes, illustrates how the enlarged group’s financials might have looked had the entities been consolidated earlier, and these materials are now incorporated by reference into Taoping’s existing U.S. shelf and employee stock plan registration statements.

The most recent analyst rating on (TAOP) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Taoping stock, see the TAOP Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TAOP is a Underperform.

Technicals also reflect a strong downtrend (below key moving averages with negative MACD), with oversold indicators only modestly offsetting. Taoping Inc., a China-based foreign private issuer listed in the U.S., operates through technology and IoT-focused subsidiaries, including newly acquired Hong Kong and mainland Chinese entities. Its portfolio now encompasses smart elevator and IoT-related operations concentrated in Shenzhen and Tianjin, positioning the group within China’s intelligent infrastructure and building-services ecosystem.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Pursues FDA Dispute Resolution for ONS-5010
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Outlook Therapeutics ( (OTLK) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. announced it had submitted a formal dispute resolution request to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration following a December 30, 2025 Complete Response Letter for its Biologics License Application for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ for neovascular age-related macular degeneration. The FDA accepted the request and granted an April 2026 meeting with a deciding official, after the company held a Type A meeting on March 2, 2026 and compiled extensive clinical and safety data it believes support approval.

The company emphasized that ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ showed clinically meaningful, statistically significant gains in visual acuity in its NORSE TWO Phase 3 trial, with additional supportive evidence from NORSE EIGHT and no safety concerns raised by the FDA to date. If ultimately approved in the U.S., ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ would be the first FDA-approved ophthalmic bevacizumab formulation for retinal disease, potentially reshaping the treatment landscape and reinforcing Outlook Therapeutics’ bid to secure a differentiated regulatory and commercial position in the retina market.

The most recent analyst rating on (OTLK) stock is a Hold with a $0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Outlook Therapeutics stock, see the OTLK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OTLK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OTLK is a Underperform.

The score is driven down primarily by very weak financials (large ongoing losses, negative equity, and heavy cash burn) and bearish technicals (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend, while recent corporate events add further financing and listing-risk overhang despite some regulatory-engagement positives.

To see Spark’s full report on OTLK stock, click here.

More about Outlook Therapeutics

Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg, bevacizumab gamma) to enhance the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retinal diseases, particularly wet age-related macular degeneration. LYTENAVA™ is the first ophthalmic bevacizumab formulation to receive marketing authorization in the EU and UK, where the company has begun commercial launches in Germany, Austria, and the UK.

In the United States, ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ remains investigational and, if approved, would become the first FDA-approved ophthalmic formulation of bevacizumab for retinal indications, including wet AMD. The product candidate is supported by a fully domestic, end-to-end U.S. manufacturing supply chain, positioning the company to serve the retina market with standardized manufacturing and pharmacovigilance infrastructure.

Average Trading Volume: 2,403,918

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $20.99M

Find detailed analytics on OTLK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vornado Realty Reports Strong 2025 Profitability Rebound
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Vornado Realty ( (VNO) ).

On April 7, 2026, Vornado Realty Trust reported its 2025 results to U.S. regulators, highlighting a sharp rebound in profitability, with net income attributable to common shares rising to $842.9 million, or $4.20 per diluted share, from $8.3 million, or $0.04 per diluted share, a year earlier. Funds from Operations (FFO), as Adjusted, increased to $465.6 million, or $2.32 per diluted share, from $447.1 million, or $2.26 per diluted share, while total net operating income reached $1.11 billion and same-store NOI grew 5.4%, signaling improving performance in its core office-led New York portfolio and key assets THE MART and 555 California Street, though gains were partly offset by tenant-related pressures and asset sales.

The company detailed that New York operations accounted for 87.3% of 2025 net operating income, with office contributing 65.6% and retail 16.2%, and THE MART and 555 California Street together providing around 13% of NOI, underscoring continued geographic and asset concentration. Management attributed the $18.5 million increase in FFO, as Adjusted, to factors including improved variable businesses, favorable real estate tax expense at THE MART, reduced net interest expense, and the PENN 1 ground rent reset, while acknowledging offsetting impacts from tenant-related items and dispositions, and noted that total shareholder return since current leadership took over has averaged 11.7% annually, with dividends comprising 2.7 percentage points of that return.

The most recent analyst rating on (VNO) stock is a Hold with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vornado Realty stock, see the VNO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VNO is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by pressured financial quality (revenue decline and leverage) and weak technical momentum (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting these are attractive valuation (low P/E) and a generally positive earnings-call backdrop on leasing/occupancy and balance-sheet actions, though 2026 guidance remains flat with near-term interest and cash NOI headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on VNO stock, click here.

More about Vornado Realty

Vornado Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust focused primarily on high-quality office, retail, and residential properties, with a heavy concentration in New York City and key assets such as THE MART in Chicago and 555 California Street in San Francisco. The company generates the bulk of its net operating income from its New York office and retail portfolio, underscoring its positioning as a major urban commercial landlord.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.29B

data.title: Xcite Uranium to Settle $42,000 Debt Through Share Issuance
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Xcite Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:XRI) ) has provided an announcement.

Xcite Uranium Inc. will issue 262,500 common shares at a price of $0.16 per share to an arm’s length creditor to settle $42,000 of debt incurred for previously provided services. The new shares, which are subject to a four-month hold period under Canadian securities regulations and Canadian Securities Exchange policies, allow the early-stage explorer to preserve cash while compensating a service provider, a typical move for junior resource companies managing limited capital.

By converting payables into equity rather than using cash, Xcite modestly reduces its balance-sheet liabilities while slightly diluting existing shareholders. The transaction underscores the company’s reliance on equity-based arrangements to fund exploration efforts in its Athabasca Basin uranium portfolio as it pursues high-grade discoveries in a competitive junior mining market.

More about Xcite Resources, Inc.

Xcite Uranium Inc. is an early-stage exploration company focused on discovering and developing energy transition metals, with a particular emphasis on uranium. Its project portfolio in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin, including the Uranium City properties such as Don Lake, Beaver River, Smitty, Lorado, Gulch and Black Bay, targets high-grade uranium deposits in a historically productive but dormant mining camp.

Average Trading Volume: 190,703

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.34M

data.title: Insmed Halts Brensocatib Development After Phase 2b Failure
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Insmed ( (INSM) ) has provided an update.

On April 7, 2026, Insmed reported topline results from its Phase 2b CEDAR trial of brensocatib in adults with moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa, showing the study failed to meet primary and secondary efficacy endpoints at both 10 mg and 40 mg doses. Despite brensocatib demonstrating a favorable safety profile with no new safety signals, patients on active treatment saw smaller reductions in abscess and inflammatory nodule counts than those on placebo over 16 weeks.

The randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study enrolled 214 patients at 72 sites globally, and the lack of efficacy in this proof-of-concept trial led Insmed to halt further development of brensocatib for hidradenitis suppurativa. The setback narrows the company’s pipeline in dermatology but preserves brensocatib’s safety record for potential use in other indications, while Insmed plans to present the data at a future medical congress, offering insights for the broader HS research community.

The most recent analyst rating on (INSM) stock is a Buy with a $181.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Insmed stock, see the INSM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INSM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INSM is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by very large ongoing losses and cash burn, plus weak technical momentum. Offsetting these, management’s bullish 2026 guidance and strong commercial execution signals, along with positive ENCORE results that may expand ARIKAYCE’s market, provide meaningful upside catalysts despite valuation being constrained by current unprofitability.

To see Spark’s full report on INSM stock, click here.

More about Insmed

Insmed Incorporated is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on developing first- and best-in-class therapies for patients with serious diseases, with a particular emphasis on pulmonary and inflammatory conditions. Headquartered in Bridgewater, N.J., the company markets two approved treatments for chronic lung diseases and advances a diversified pipeline, including gene therapy and AI-driven protein engineering programs.

Insmed operates research and office locations across the U.S., Europe and Japan, targeting patient communities with high unmet medical need. Its early-stage work spans multiple modalities, such as RNA technologies and synthetic rescue, underscoring a strategy to build a broad platform in serious, often rare, conditions rather than relying on a single asset or therapeutic area.

Average Trading Volume: 2,576,170

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $35.31B

Find detailed analytics on INSM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Aimei Health Extends Business Combination Deadline with Funding
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd ( (AFJK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd deposited $34,330.96 into its trust account, enabling a one-month extension of the deadline to complete its initial business combination from April 6, 2026 to May 6, 2026, marking the seventeenth permitted extension. This latest extension underscores the company’s continued efforts to finalize a merger with United Hydrogen Group Inc. while preserving value for public shareholders through incremental funding of the trust.

In connection with the extension, Aimei issued an unsecured, non-interest-bearing promissory note for $34,330.96 to its sponsor Aimei Health Ltd and United Hydrogen Group Inc., with each party contributing half of the funding. The note, repayable upon completion of the proposed business combination with United Hydrogen, can be optionally converted into private units at $10.00 per unit, aligning the interests of the sponsor and target with the successful closing of the transaction.

More about Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd

Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd is a Cayman Islands-incorporated special purpose acquisition company focused on completing an initial business combination, currently targeting a merger with United Hydrogen Group Inc. The company maintains a trust account for the benefit of its public shareholders while it seeks to consummate this transaction.
